channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Duffy's campaign for son-in-law's House seat sparks backlash in Wisconsin
item.description: Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy is aggressively campaigning for his 26-year-old son-in-law's Wisconsin House bid, angering local Republicans.

item.title: Steve Hilton and Xavier Becerra to compete in California governor race
item.description: Republican Steve Hilton and Democrat Xavier Becerra are set to face off in the California governor's race in November, per the Associated Press.

item.title: U.S. and Iran exchange strikes after helicopter downing
item.description: The U.S. launched strikes against Iran on Tuesday evening in retaliation for Iran's downing of a U.S. helicopter.

item.title: Supreme Court's final cases loom over Trump's immigration, election hopes
item.description: The last Supreme Court decisions of the term include major tests of presidential power and election law that could affect voting.
